scripts.// prepublish: rimraf -I dist; npm run build; npm run copy:package:cjs; npm run test
scripts.prepublish: rimraf -I dist; npm run build; npm run copy:package:cjs;
scripts.test:all: cross-env NODE_ENV=$NODE_ENV tape integration-tests/index.js integration-tests/*.test.js | tap-spec
